�新 New (Published: July 1, 2026)

Pedestrians and drivers alike—follow traffic rules and help prevent traffic accidents.

Summer Traffic Safety Campaign (Reiwa 8)

Campaign Period: July 15–24, 2026 (10 days)

Unified Action Day: Friday, July 17, 2026 — "Zero Traffic Fatalities Day"

Slogan: People, cars, bicycles—safe and secure, Saitama

Campaign Focus

• Prevention of traffic accidents involving children and seniors

• Promoting compliance with bicycle traffic rules and helmet use

• Promoting speed reduction measures on residential roads

For details, see the Saitama Prefecture website below.

Summer Traffic Safety Campaign (Reiwa 8) (Opens in new window)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jinkenkurashianzen/10881.html
